command: fabio kql-database query --workspace $WS_ID --id $DB_ID --kql "SensorEvents | summarize avg(temperature) by bin(timestamp, 1h) | top 3 by avg_temperature desc"
description: Executes a KQL query against a Fabric KQL Database and returns structured results.
notes: KQL input via --kql (inline), @file.kql (file), or stdin pipe. Management commands (starting with '.') use /v1/rest/mgmt endpoint; data queries use /v2/rest/query. Token is scoped to the Kusto query URI (not standard Fabric scope). The query URI is auto-resolved from item properties.
